validation.firstNameRequired: First name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.lastNameRequired: Last name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.nationalIdInvalid: National ID must be exactly 10 digits.

nisabSelector.title: Nisab Standard
nisabSelector.description: Zakat becomes obligatory when your net wealth equals or exceeds the value of 85 grams of pure gold (24K).

results.zakatRequired: Your wealth exceeds the Nisab threshold. Zakat is obligatory.
results.zakatNotRequired: Your wealth is below the Nisab threshold. No zakat is required.
results.noResult: Click "Calculate Zakat" to see your results.
